root.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(current_date , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as sysdate_tdate, (select coop_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as coop_name, sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_share_mem, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename WHERE ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code ) -- (sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no between :as_bgroup and :as_egroup ) AND --( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' ) /*WHERE*/

r_ktm_book_assure_format02_nest.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance, sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai ((sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance)::double precision) as thai_principal_balance, sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no FROM sc_lon_m_loan_card WHERE ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 )

r_ktm_book_assure_format02_nest2.sql: SELECT sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no, sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai ((sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no)::double precision) as thai_deposit_account_no, sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_name, sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_balance FROM sc_dep_m_creditor WHERE ( sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no = {0} ) AND ( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_balance > 0 )
